response.justification: The candidate does not meet the mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (2000-2001) and a bachelor thesis project — nowhere near the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ required. The resume shows no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MySQL and MongoDB), no Windows platform focus, and no Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain expertise. The brief RIDE Capital tenure was Node/TypeScript/GraphQL work, not C++ in a banking context. Strong generalist background, but a mismatch for this specialized role.
strengths: Long software engineering career with breadth across stacks
Some early-career C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer tool
Strong testing discipline and engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No substantial recent C++ experience; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no demonstrated Windows platform work
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows focus
